docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARVALHO, FELIPE GALLI AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-25-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. ***PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM*** PLAINTIFF FELIPE GALL CARVALHO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED PORTUGESE INTERPRETER STELLA HECHT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN MACDOWELL. DEFENDANT'S ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF: WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM.
ORDER TO CONTINUE DUE TO UNAVAILABILITY OF PORTUGUESE-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER TO ASSIST PLAINTIFF (***THIS IS A NON-STIP TO JPT MATTER***)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,960.00 FILED BY CARVALHO, FELIPE GALLI AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2023 - CONTINUED TO OCT-20-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 624. PARTIES DID NOT STIP TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT APPEARED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2023 BY SHARON M. REARDON. PLAINTIFF FELIPE GALLI CARVALHO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN MACDOWELL. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY A PORTUGUESE-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER, LOUISA MCEWEN #301018. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SHARON REARDON; CLERK: KEVIN RAYALA. NOT REPORTED. (624)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-11-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2023 - ***PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM*** - CONTINUED DUE TO UNAVAILABILITY OF PORTUGUESE-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER TO ASSIST THE PLAINTIFF TO OCT-20-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FELIPE GALLI CARVALHO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN MACDOWELL. A PORTUGUESE-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE TO ASSIST THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: STEPHEN M. MURPHY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARVALHO, FELIPE GALLI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC $50.83 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
